hero.description: Not Regular Events was born from our own experience as students in Madrid. We create accessible, authentic events designed to connect people — more than parties, we create experiences and new friendships.

events.noEvents: No events live right now — new dates dropping soon.
events.failedToLoadSub: Please refresh the page and try again.
events.noEventsFilter: No events match your current filters.
events.noEventsDefault: Check back soon — events are being planned!
events.started: This event has started — get there!

ambassador.label: AMBASSADOR PROGRAM
ambassador.description: Love Not Regular Events? Tell your friends and earn 5% commission on every event they book — plus exclusive rewards the more you grow.
ambassador.commissionDesc: On every booking made with your code

reviews.label: WHAT OUR COMMUNITY SAYS
reviews.formSubtitle: Tell us how your experience was.
reviews.noReviewsYet: No reviews yet — be the first!
reviews.errorTooShort: Review must be at least 10 characters.
reviews.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

community.label: COMMUNITY
community.description: Students and night owls. Weekly events. Lifelong friendships. This is the Not Regular Events community in Madrid.
community.whatsappSubtitle: All groups are moderated and Madrid-based.
community.studentCommunityDesc: Connect with other students, make new friends and find your people in Madrid.
community.partyGroupDesc: Get notified about events, drops and exclusive guestlist access first.
community.housingGroupDesc: Haven't found a room yet? Share listings and find flatmates to search together.

housingBanner.text: Looking for a room in Madrid?
housingBanner.subtext: Browse verified rooms and student listings.

newsletter.label: STAY UPDATED
newsletter.title: Never Miss A Thing
newsletter.description: Event drops, party announcements and exclusive member offers — straight to your inbox. No spam, ever.
newsletter.successDesc: Thanks for subscribing. You'll be the first to know about upcoming events and party announcements.

footer.tagline: Not your regular events. Guestlist parties, club nights and the best nightlife experiences in Madrid.
footer.stayInLoopDesc: Get event drops & exclusive offers — no spam, ever.

housing.noRoomDesc: Haven't found a room in Madrid yet? Here we share flat listings, available rooms and connect with other students looking together.

membership.allPlansInclude: All plans include full community access. Upgrade or cancel anytime.

auth.loginSubtitle: Login to your Not Regular Events account
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your free account and never miss an event
